title: Data Consent
description: Manage how this institute processes your child's personal data under the DPDP Act 2023

privacyNotice.title: Privacy Notice
privacyNotice.body: Under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023, you control how your child's personal data is processed. You may grant or withdraw consent for each purpose at any time. Withdrawals take effect immediately and create a permanent, append-only record.

academic_data_processing.label: Academic data processing
academic_data_processing.description: Required for grades, attendance, report cards, and academic records

photo_video_marketing.label: Photos and videos for marketing
photo_video_marketing.description: Use of your child's photo or video on the institute website, brochures, or social media

whatsapp_communication.label: WhatsApp messages
whatsapp_communication.description: Sending notifications and updates over WhatsApp

sms_communication.label: SMS messages
sms_communication.description: Sending notifications and updates over SMS

aadhaar_collection.label: Aadhaar collection
aadhaar_collection.description: Collecting Aadhaar number for board exam registration or RTE compliance

biometric_collection.label: Biometric collection
biometric_collection.description: Fingerprint or facial recognition for attendance

third_party_edtech.label: Third-party EdTech tools
third_party_edtech.description: Sharing academic data with EdTech learning platforms

board_exam_registration.label: Board exam registration
board_exam_registration.description: Sharing data with state or national education boards for exam registration

transport_tracking.label: Transport GPS tracking
transport_tracking.description: Tracking your child's location during institute transport

health_data_processing.label: Health data processing
health_data_processing.description: Recording health information, allergies, and medical history

appendOnlyNotice: Each change creates a new record. The full history is preserved for audit and legal compliance.

withdrawDialog.title: Withdraw consent?
withdrawDialog.description: You are about to withdraw consent for "{purpose}" for {child}. This creates a permanent append-only record and the institute will stop processing this data immediately.

empty.title: No children linked
empty.description: Consent management is only available when children are linked to your account

notAGuardian.title: Guardian access only
notAGuardian.description: The data consent dashboard is only available for parents and legal guardians.
